records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, I've gone over your proposal thoroughly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, I've gone over your proposal thoroughly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, I've gone over your proposal thoroughly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The terms are quite reasonable. Just as you said, there's nothing to lose by joining forces.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The terms are quite reasonable. Just as you said, there's nothing to lose by joining forces.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The terms are quite reasonable. Just as you said, there's nothing to lose by joining forces.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But before that, there is something I need to ask you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But before that, there is something I need to ask you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But before that, there is something I need to ask you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even with that much power... Why do you fight for others?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even with that much power... Why do you fight for others?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even with that much power... Why do you fight for others?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If all you had was some petty sense of justice, I might entrust you with a sword, but never my back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If all you had was some petty sense of justice, I might entrust you with a sword, but never my back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If all you had was some petty sense of justice, I might entrust you with a sword, but never my back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Very well. Our interests align for now, so I'll lend you Red Shift's strength.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Very well. Our interests align for now, so I'll lend you Red Shift's strength.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Very well. Our interests align for now, so I'll lend you Red Shift's strength.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Show me where your so-called justice actually leads.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Show me where your so-called justice actually leads.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Show me where your so-called justice actually leads.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And whether that unshaken conviction of yours truly endures to the end.
